free_text: The differential cross section and polarization

Fe, Cu, I, Hg and Pb

An associated particle time-of-flight system was used
multi-channel analyser data collection system were
The asymmetry in the scattering of polarized neutrons

adequate monitoring of the N-flux provided to

Six and twelve cylindrical NE213 liquid scintillators

Their containers were made of thin Al and completely
Detectors moved in 2 groups of 3 around the scatterer,
one group for measuring scattering to the right,the
other to the left.Within each group the angle between
the detectors was fixed at 28 degrees.
The table carrying the sct sample and six detectors
was mounted on a 2-wheeled cradle which could rotate
about an axis joining the n-producing target to the
In addition to the 6 detectors,2 neutrons monitors
were required for normalization to determine sct.cs.
One,the collimated beam monitor was a NE213 liquid
scintillator in a glass cell(12.7cm diam,3.8cm thick)
the other a 2mm thick Li-I(eV) crystal scintillation
detector(enriched to 96% Li-6) surrounded by 10 cm
thickness of paraffin wax, was placed near the target.
